title: B.C.S.M.E
description: B.C.S.M.E is a collection of quality of life client-side mods ,textures and shaders with the Fabulously Optimized performance
body:
![a text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8a5a7e9c695b88a81000bdc02d244c7df32f400.png)

Best Client Side Mods Ever (B.C.S.M.E) is a collection of **Vanilla+ mods**, textures and shaders featuring Fabulously Optimized mods to give it a fps boost.
## 🎮Vanilla feel
This modpack adds a bunch of quality of life features, useful mods, shaders and textures to the game without removing the vanilla feel, no new dimensions, no new blocks, just vanilla **but better**
## ⚙️Features
Sound mods to make it more immersive\
Mods to make minecraft visuals better, adding cave dust, more particles and etc\
More animations\
And more!
## 🚀Optimizations
With Sodium, Lithium, Indium, ModernFix, Iris and more you can get alot of fps while playing\
with 4 different shaders, you can use different presets like low, medium and high
## 🛠️Customization
you can change every mod setting to your liking\
you can turn on and off textures, lke the dark ui or the glowing ore texture\
you can change video settings to your liking (and your pc)

_the rest you can see by yourself_
